label: Strategy List
description: Grouped strategy card grid with filters, performance metrics, sparklines, and action links per strategy.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper covers all grid widgets.

0.5.note: no lib/mocks imports in widget file.

0.8.note: error surfaced at WidgetErrorBoundary level; StrategiesDataProvider silently falls back to mock data — no error field exposed by context, boundary is the correct gate.

0.9.note: no dead code. Prettier applied (fixed indentation in grouped section).

l0.notes: 0.1 ✓ WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper covers all grid widgets. 0.2 ✓ requiredEntitlements: [execution-basic, execution-full]. 0.3 ✓ availableOn: [strategies]. 0.4 ✓ no any / @ts-ignore. 0.5 ✓ no lib/mocks imports in widget file. 0.6 ✓ Spinner rendered when isLoading. 0.7 ✓ empty message when filteredStrategies.length === 0. 0.8 ✓ error surfaced at WidgetErrorBoundary level; StrategiesDataProvider silently falls back to mock data — no error field exposed by context, boundary is the correct gate. 0.9 ✓ no dead code. Prettier applied (fixed indentation in grouped section).

1.1.note: data from useStrategiesData() only, no inline fetch.

1.2.note: context calls useGlobalScope() and filters via getStrategyIdsForScope + getClientIdsForOrgs.

1.3.note: org filter change → scopeClientIds rebuilds → strategies re-filtered.

l1.notes: 1.1 ✓ data from useStrategiesData() only, no inline fetch. 1.2 ✓ context calls useGlobalScope() and filters via getStrategyIdsForScope + getClientIdsForOrgs. 1.3 ✓ org filter change → scopeClientIds rebuilds → strategies re-filtered. 1.4 ✓ client filter cascades via getClientIdsForOrgs in context. 1.5 ✓ strategy filter via getStrategyIdsForScope. 1.6 ✓ empty scope arrays → returns DEFAULT_STRATEGIES (all). 1.7 ✓ ARCHETYPES/ASSET_CLASS_COLORS/STATUSES in lib/config/services/strategies.config.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

findings: L0-0.8: StrategiesDataProvider does not expose an error field — it silently falls back to DEFAULT_STRATEGIES on API failure. Error boundary at WidgetWrapper level is the error gate. No widget-level fix possible without modifying context (READ ONLY for this pass).
